de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation

Class JMLBuiltInPropertyResolver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLExpressionResolver
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.JMLBuiltInPropertyResolver

  • public final class JMLBuiltInPropertyResolver
extends SLExpressionResolver
    Resolver for built-in JML operators. Currently only handles array length.

      • canHandleReceiver

      • doResolving

        protected SLExpression doResolving(SLExpression receiver,
                       String name,
                       SLParameters parameters)
                            throws SLTranslationException
        Description copied from class: SLExpressionResolver
        Resolves property calls on explicit receivers.
        Specified by:
        doResolving in class SLExpressionResolver
        Parameters:
        receiver - receiver (may *not* be null)
        name - name of the property
        parameters - the actual parameters, or null if not applicable
        Returns:
        a suitable term or collection if successful, null otherwise
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException
